channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-05 01:50 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Empathy is good But fraudsters and embezzlers have hijacked our empathy $81k/yr per homeless person ...
item.description: Empathy is good But fraudsters and embezzlers have hijacked our empathy $81k/yr per homeless person $52k/yr per capita income This is insanity and is clearly untenable.

item.title: @elonmusk: Quality mode of Grok Imagine is insane
item.description: Quality mode of Grok Imagine is insane

item.title: @elonmusk: I was on a Tesla audio space here on X today and got in an argument with a Tesla skeptic. He says ho...
item.description: I was on a Tesla audio space here on X today and got in an argument with a Tesla skeptic. He says how smooth your AI is at driving doesn’t matter. I am on the Freeway as I type this. It does. And you need a lot of data to get there. Get a ride in a Tesla and a Waymo or an NVIDIA and you tell m me.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk and his staff at Space X truly care DO about deaf kids. More details to come! But basicall...
item.description: Elon Musk and his staff at Space X truly care DO about deaf kids. More details to come! But basically, I will love him forever.

item.title: @elonmusk: The Tesla chip design reviews are so fun!
item.description: The Tesla chip design reviews are so fun!

item.title: @elonmusk: Dr. Oz: “We have shut down just in the last ten weeks 221 hospices.” Bret: “Wait, over 220 in the st...
item.description: Dr. Oz: “We have shut down just in the last ten weeks 221 hospices.” Bret: “Wait, over 220 in the state of California?” Dr. Oz: “Yes, in Los Angeles alone.”

item.title: @elonmusk: My idea of a good time is working with amazing engineers to create incredible technology 🤩 The Tesla...
item.description: My idea of a good time is working with amazing engineers to create incredible technology 🤩 The Tesla chip research fab will have all the machines needed to do logic, memory, packing & masks in one building for a lightning fast development cycle. Heaven 💫

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine is embarrassingly fun. Creative mode? Activated. You blink. There’s a full anime scene ...
item.description: Grok Imagine is embarrassingly fun. Creative mode? Activated. You blink. There’s a full anime scene staring back.@Grok

item.title: @elonmusk: Incredible that any Briton could not want this guy to be the next prime minister.xcancel.com/RupertL...
item.description: Incredible that any Briton could not want this guy to be the next prime minister.xcancel.com/RupertLowe10/status/20…

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon’s data centers are absolute units
item.description: Elon’s data centers are absolute units

item.title: @elonmusk: ChatGPT literally just flagged the Seven Last Words of Jesus on Good Friday....hit a policy violatio...
item.description: ChatGPT literally just flagged the Seven Last Words of Jesus on Good Friday....hit a policy violation & marked it as "dangerous" 🤦 My friend was just doing sermon research. That's it. But here's the wild part..... ChatGPT has no problem giving a step-by-step guide for suicide… yet somehow a quote from the Bible is marked as harmful and blocked as a policy violation Make it make sense...ChatGPT is just utterly woke AI 🤡
